repo_prior_art.cite: ThmSmith/doc/API.md §3 seed ExactID/PartialID catalogues are empty; no in-catalogue multi-mediator proxy-bound proposal

published_prior_art.cite: GabrielSachsSjolander2023 sharp two-binary-mediator bounds and GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 proxy partial-ID give the ingredients, but not this exact joint coupling/proxy LP dictionary

GabrielSachsSjolander2023 covers sharp two-mediator bounds; GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 covers proxy partial-ID without completeness; GhassamiYangShpitserTchetgen2025 covers hidden mediator proxies, but none states the interior active-face coupling/proxy phenomenon
VanderWeeleVansteelandt2014 and XiaChan2022 cover additive/no-interaction multiple-mediator reductions; this is a setup-specific sanity reduction, not flagship novelty

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses GhassamiYangShpitserTchetgen2025, Causal inference with hidden mediators, a closer comparator for proxy/hidden-mediator identification even though it does not subsume the dependence-band partial-ID kernel.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The conjecture calls the LP endpoint a sharp PNDE bound under Assumptions finite--proxy-envelope, while §11 says sharpness needs the separate canonical-sharpness realization assumption.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed equivalence to the separate/rectangular relaxation is not fully defined: the proposal does not specify the exact union/intersection operation over fixed-q proxy intervals.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Ghassami, Yang, Shpitser, and Tchetgen Tchetgen 2025 as an explicit related-work comparator and state why hidden-mediator proxy point identification differs from marginal-only mediator coupling plus proxy-confounding bounds.
Either add Assumption canonical-sharpness to Conjecture 1 or rewrite its sharpness language as an LP-bound phenomenon until a realization argument is included.
Define B_sep formally as a displayed set or interval operation, including whether fixed-q proxy intervals are unioned, intersected, or optimized jointly over q.
Strengthen the flagship by giving a rational toy parameter template for the intended interior active face, even if the witness remains conjectural.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and formalize the sharpness/rectangular-relaxation language before Stage 0.
